description: CompositionWhite leatherette bag with glossy finish, black polka dots, side straps, two compartments and a separate chamber for mobile and cosmeticsAn ideal party bag which also comes in attractive shades of moss green, brick orange, chocolate brown and brown, this accessory has zippers in the same colour as that of the body, making it look simple yet stylish. The round straps assure a good grip, while the two straps on either side are only meant to create a fashion statement. There’s ample space to carry your party kit and essentials. So go all out and add that glossy glitz to parties in town.Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
